message:
test(promise): expand from 39 to 59 tests for promise/future and spawn system (wa-1a3kz)

lib.rs: +10 tests — double-resolve overwrite, err-then-ok overwrite, Future Debug,
promise drop without resolve leaves future pending, cross-thread err, bool/option types,
multiple pending polls then ready, BrokenPromise error trait.

spawn.rs: +10 tests — nested async block_on, unit/vec block_on, scoped executor
multiple futures, chained async, low-priority computation, spawn_into_new_thread with
sleep and vec return, multiple threads concurrent, get_scoped helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
